decision_reason: Strong attendance and training progress at a high-performing school. Credit profile is solid.
Consistent engagement and good progression. School context is strong. Minor credit band gap is acceptable.
Near completion with excellent training hours and perfect attendance consistency. Low risk.
Solid candidate at a well-performing school. Training hours and attendance are above average.
Early but promising. School confidence is high and candidate engagement is consistent.
Strong finisher at an approved school. Recommend approval with standard terms.
Good progress at a stable school. Attendance is acceptable. Recommend approval.
Engaged candidate with solid training hours. School is approved with minor caveats.
Early stage with moderate attendance. School is approved but candidate data is limited. Manual review recommended.
Candidate progress is moderate and school is under review. Combined uncertainty warrants a manual review.
Strong candidate individually but school status is under review. Hold new disbursements until school is cleared.

Average engagement at a school with data gaps. Recommend review pending school data remediation.
Candidate is progressing but school confidence is low. Cannot approve until school issues are resolved.

Suspended school and low engagement. Do not process.
